name: Valkeala Birds
short_description: Puzzle game where mission is to use slingshot and shoot and kill all pigs at different levels. Player can use 3 different birds at each level
detailed_description:
STORY:

Play this 2d puzzle adventure game, where mission is to use slingshot and 3 different birds at every level. Player mission is to destroy every pigs at different levels by using slingshot and 3 different birds which all have little bit different damage system. There is different amount of pigs and different obstacles at every level. Game contains 34 different themed levels. Game is similar game as Angry birds game, so can you be accurate slingshot user and destroy every evil pigs at every level

FEATURES:

  • 34 levels

- Steam achievements

- Slingshot and 3 different birds to shoot

  • Enemies and obstacles
